/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/gui_installer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/fingerprint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/verifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/app_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/anti_re.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/license_embed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/tpm_attest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/tpm_seal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_installer_gui.dir/src/secure_logger.cpp.o -o secure_installer_gui  /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -ldl -lgtk-4 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lvulkan -lgraphene-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ltss2-esys -ltss2-mu -ltss2-rc -ltss2-tctildr
